message.content:
Here are the next steps:

- Provide the stable reference text: paste it here, upload a file (PDF, Word, text), or share a publicly accessible link.
- Tell me your preferences: 
  - Desired length (e.g., 1 paragraph, 2–3 paragraphs, or bullet points)
  - Focus (main ideas, conclusions, key findings, or a high-level overview)
  - Audience or tone (plain language vs. technical)
- If the document is long, you can share it in sections or give me an outline of the key parts you care about. I can summarize piece by piece or provide a full summary after you provide the sections.

If you can’t share the full text, you can also give:
- the document title and purpose
- the top three points or findings
- any specific aspects you want emphasized

Tell me how you’d like to proceed, and I’ll start summarizing right away.
